commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent fallback error classification so mixed billing fallback summaries show billing guidance, updates the matching regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main has a mixed rate_limit plus billing fallback-summary test that expects generic failure text, and the runtime gates only classify pure billing summaries as billing. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
